editor.nextStepValidateSubmit: Next: validate the polygon, then submit

tips.clickToAdd: Click on the canvas to add a point; click elsewhere to connect points and form a shape.
tips.doubleClickHole: Double-click on the canvas to start a new shape (e.g. a hole) without connecting to the previous point.
tips.clickEdgeToSplit: Click an edge to select it, then click it again to add a vertex and split the edge.
tips.connectTwoVertices: Click one vertex, then another to connect them with a new edge.
tips.largestIsBoundary: The largest closed shape is the room boundary; smaller closed shapes inside it become obstacles.
tips.obstaclesNoOverlap: Obstacles must not intersect or contain each other.
tips.dragVertices: Drag vertices to move them and adjust the polygon.
tips.deleteKey: Select a vertex or edge, then press Delete or Backspace to remove it.
tips.arrowKeysScroll: Use the arrow keys to scroll the canvas when the drawing is larger than the view.
tips.validateThenSubmit: Draw your room boundary and any obstacles, then click Validate and, if valid, Submit to create the job.

toolbar.clearConfirm: This will remove all vertices and edges from the canvas. This action cannot be undone.
toolbar.clickToClose: Click near the first point (green) to close

validation.POLYGON_VERTEX_DEGREE_OK: No repeated vertices (each point has degree 2).
validation.POLYGON_VERTEX_DEGREE_GT2: A vertex appears more than once (degree > 2); polygon is not simple.
validation.OBSTACLE_VERTEX_DEGREE_OK: No repeated vertices (each point has degree 2).
validation.OBSTACLE_VERTEX_DEGREE_GT2: A vertex appears more than once (degree > 2); polygon is not simple.
validation.OBSTACLE_CONTAINED_OK: Obstacle is fully inside the boundary.
validation.OBSTACLE_NOT_CONTAINED: Obstacle is not fully inside the boundary.
validation.VALIDATIONS_FAILED_OR_PENDING: One or more validations failed or are pending.
validation.requirementObstacleContained: Each obstacle must be fully inside the boundary
